headline: Ross Stores Beat Earnings and Gained 68% in a Year. Reddit Is Still Betting Against It.
summary: The nation’s largest “off-retail” retail chain, Ross Stores (NASDAQ:ROST), just delivered one of its strongest quarters in years, yet Reddit’s r/wallstreetbets is running a short thesis against it. As far as the numbers go, Q4 FY2026 comparable store sales surged 9%, stacked on top of a +3% comp in the prior year. EPS came in ... Ross Stores Beat Earnings and Gained 68% in a Year. Reddit Is Still Betting Against It.

headline: Can Kohl's Omnichannel Investments Reverse the Sales Decline?
summary: KSS ramps up omnichannel strategy with inventory and digital upgrades to improve customer experience and address ongoing sales pressure.
